SEARCH
Package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories

Class BookingRepository

java.lang.Object
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
public class BookingRepository extends Object
Static in-memory repository that holds all Booking records for the currently logged-in user. Uses a LinkedHashMap to preserve insertion order, which is important for consistent display in the booking history table. The repository is populated on login and flushed to disk on logout or exit via BookingCsvIO.

      public BookingRepository()

  • Method Details

    • getBookings

      public static LinkedHashMap<String,Booking> getBookings()
      Returns the entire in-memory booking map for the current session.
      Returns:
      a LinkedHashMap mapping booking ID → Booking

    • setBookings

      public static void setBookings(LinkedHashMap<String,Booking> movies)
      Replaces the current in-memory booking store with the given map. Called after login to load the current user's bookings from the CSV file.
      Parameters:
      movies - the LinkedHashMap of booking ID → Booking to set as the active booking store

    • addBooking

      public static Booking addBooking(String email, String movieId, String showtime, HashSet<String> selectedSeats, int totalPrice)
      Creates a new Booking from the supplied parameters, stores it in the in-memory repository, and returns the created instance. The booking ID is automatically generated as a UUID, and the showtime string is parsed using Movie.getDatetimeFormat(). The new booking is marked as unprocessed (isProcessed = false) so that it will be written to disk on the next save operation.
      Parameters:
      email - the email address of the user making the booking
      movieId - the ID of the movie being booked
      showtime - the showtime string in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format
      selectedSeats - the set of seat IDs chosen by the user
      totalPrice - the total price for all selected seats
      Returns:
      the newly created and stored Booking instance

    • searchBookings

      public static ArrayList<Booking> searchBookings(String information)
      Searches the in-memory booking store for records matching the given information string. If the string exactly matches a booking ID, that single booking is returned. Otherwise, all bookings whose associated movie title, showtime string, or total price string match the query are returned.
      Parameters:
      information - the search query; may be a booking ID, movie title, showtime in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format, or a total price value
      Returns:
      an ArrayList of Booking objects matching the search query; empty if no matches are found

    • calculateTotalPrice

      public static int calculateTotalPrice(HashSet<String> chosenSeats, int pricePerSeat)
      Calculates the total booking price based on the number of chosen seats and the per-seat price of the movie.
      Parameters:
      chosenSeats - the set of seat IDs selected by the user
      pricePerSeat - the price in dollars charged per seat
      Returns:
      the total price as the product of seat count and per-seat price
